text:
User: no, build it as an actual ios app -- I have xcode and everything! [...] Assistant: On it — real native SwiftUI app this time, full-bleed (no web-style cards), circuit/superset-aware, and a TikTok-style one-set-at-a-time flow. First let me check your toolchain so I target the right SDK (real Liquid Glass needs the Xcode 26 SDK). [...] ## What you have
A **real native iOS app** (`WorkoutMD`, SwiftUI, iOS 26 SDK) at `/Users/pablofernandez/Work/workout.md/WorkoutMD/`, built with real Liquid Glass APIs — coded by Sonnet agents, orchestrated + built + verified by me. [...] Assistant: Key findings: toolchain is ready (Rust iOS targets + `uniffi-bindgen` installed), `gh` is authed as **pablof7z** (repo scope), **WorkoutMD is already a git repo on `master` with an `origin`**, the user wired **code signing** (`DEVELOPMENT_TEAM C99QRJCR43`, automatic) into `project.yml`, and **Pablo's iPhone 17 Pro Max is connected** for deploy. `~/src/tenex-edge` is a Rust nostr/NIP-29 project (good — that agent is mapping it). [...] Assistant: Located it: the "win" app is **`~/src/wintheday-ios`** (WinTheDay), and `gh` is authed as **pablof7z** who owns **`github.com:pablof7z/workout.md`** (already the remote). Redirecting the reference agent to the right path and standing up the epic.
